---
title: "Join Us"
description: "Open positions and application information"
---

We welcome students and collaborators interested in cognitive dynamics, computational modeling, behavioral experiments, and human-AI interaction.

## Prospective graduate students

Please send an email with:

- A brief statement of research interests
- CV or resume
- Transcript, if applicable
- Writing sample or project portfolio, if available

## Undergraduate research assistants

Undergraduate students can contribute to literature review, experiment implementation, data collection, data analysis, and visualization.

## Collaborators

We are open to interdisciplinary collaborations in cognitive science, psychology, neuroscience, computer science, design, education, and AI.

## Contact

Email: <your.email@university.edu>
